title: आदर के योग्य वह / Worthy of Honour

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Worthy of honour and worthy of glory and
Worthy of praise is He
He has redeemed me by the blood of the Lamb
Set my spirit free .............. Worthy of Honour ...............

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
आदर के योग्य वह, महिमा के योग्य वह
स्तुति के योग्य है वह
अपने ख़ून से छुड़ाया मुझे
आत्मा में आज़ादी दी .................. आदर के योग्य वह ...............

title: अपने हाथ उठाकर स्तुति / With my hands lifted up

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
With my hands lifted up, and my mouth filled with praise
I will bless thee O Lord - 2
With a heart of thanks giving, I will bless thee O Lord.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
अपने हाथ उठाकर स्तुति के शब्दों से
धन्यवादित हृदय से तुझे धन्य कहूँ ।
तुझे धन्य कहूँ - 2
धन्यवादित हृदय से, तुझे धन्य कहूँ ।

title: प्रभु है, प्रभु है / He is Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
He is Lord, He is Lord, He is risen from the dead and He is Lord
Every knee shall bow, every tongue shall confess
That Jesus Christ is Lord.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
प्रभु है, प्रभु है वह मृत्युंजय प्रभु यीशु है
हर एक घुटना टिकेगा
हर एक जीभ मान लेगी कि यीशु ही प्रभु है ।

title: है मेरा यीशु ज़िंदा सर्वदा / Alive, Alive

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Alive, Alive, Alive for evermore
My Jesus is alive, alive for evermore
Alive, Alive, Alive for evermore
My Jesus is alive
Sing Halleluyah - 2, my Jesus is alive for evermore
Sing Halleluyah - 2, my Jesus is alive

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
है मेरा यीशु ज़िंदा सर्वदा
है ज़िंदा सर्वदा, वह सबका है ख़ुदा
है मेरा यीशु ज़िंदा सर्वदा
है ज़िंदा सर्वदा
हल्लेलूयाह - 2, है मेरा यीशु ज़िंदा सर्वदा
हल्लेलूयाह - 2, है ज़िंदा है सदा ।

title: आनन्द जयानन्द / Joy so full and triumphant

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
So rich and abundant, joy so full and triumphant
Nothing can happen, no man take away
In the shadow of turning, oil still keeping me burning
The wonder of wonders, Jesus is mine.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
तेरा जीवन वह मेरा, आनन्द जयानन्द से बढ़कर
जो छीनी न जाए, न ही मिट सके
पर चाल जो चमके, तेल जो मुझे जलाए
वह कैसा है अद्भुत, यीशु मेरा है ।

title: प्रभु की महिमा, मुझे उभारा / Glory to God, He has lifted me up

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Glory to God, He has lifted me up
He has lifted me up I know
He reached out His hand and He lifted me up
And that's why I love Him so
I love Him more and more - 2
And when I stand upon the other shore
I'll praise Him more and more.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
प्रभु की महिमा, मुझे उभारा
उसने मुझको उभारा है
उसने हाथ बढ़ाकर मुझे उभार लिया
इसलिए उससे प्रेम करूँगा
उससे प्रेम करूँगा - 2
स्वर्गीय छोर पर जब पहुँचूँगा मैं
उसकी स्तुति करता रहूँगा ।

title: तूने ऐ ख़ुदा बनाया आसमान / Our Lord God Thou hast made the heavens

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Our Lord God Thou hast made the heavens
And the earth by Thy great power
Our Lord God Thou hast made the heavens
And the earth by Thine outstretched arm
Nothing is too difficult for Thee (2)
O Great and mighty God
Great in counsel and mighty in deed
Nothing, nothing, absolutely nothing (3)
Nothing is too difficult for Thee.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
तूने ऐ ख़ुदा बनाया आसमान
और ज़मीं को अपने सामर्थ वचन से
तूने ऐ ख़ुदा बनाया है इंसान
अपने ख़ूबसूरत हाथों से
कुछ कठिन नहीं तेरे लिए (2)
तू है सामर्थ में महान, है कितने अनोखे तेरे काम
कुछ भी नहीं हरगिज़ नहीं, कुछ कठिन नहीं तेरे लिए (3)

title: होसन्ना, होसन्ना / Hosanna

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Hosanna, hosanna, hosanna in the highest (2)
Lord we lift up your name
With our hearts filled with praise
We exalt you O Lord our God
Hosanna in the highest.
Jesus, Jesus, Jesus in the highest ...........
Glory, Glory, Glory to the King of kings ................

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
होसन्ना, होसन्ना, होसन्ना आसमान में (2)
प्रभु, हम ऊँचा करते तेरा नाम
दिल से हम स्तुति करते हैं
हम ऊँचा करते हैं, हे हमारे प्रभु परमेश्वर
होसन्ना आसमान में ।
यीशु, यीशु, यीशु आसमान में ............
जय हो, जय हो, राजाओं के राजा की ............

title: यीशु सब में है श्रेष्ठ नाम / Name above all names

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Name above all names
Beautiful Saviour, Glorious Lord
Emmanuel, God is with us
Blessed Redeemer, Living Word.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
यीशु सब में है श्रेष्ठ नाम
हितकर उद्धारक, महिमामय प्रभु
इम्मानुएल, परमेश्वर साथ है
धन्य त्राता, जीवित वचन ।

title: मैं यहोवा की करुणा के गीत / I will sing of the mercies of the Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
I will sing of the mercies of the Lord
Forever I will sing, I will sing
I will sing of the mercies of the Lord
Forever I will sing of the mercies of the Lord.
With my mouth will I make known
Thy faithfulness, Thy faithfulness.
With my mouth will I make known
Thy faithfulness to all generations.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
मैं यहोवा की करुणा के गीत
गाऊँगा, सर्वदा, सर्वदा
मैं यहोवा की करुणा के गीत
गाऊँगा सर्वदा, जब तक ज़िंदा रहूँगा ।
उसकी वफ़ा का, मेरी ज़ुबां, करेगी बयान, करेगी बयान
उसकी वफ़ा का, मेरी ज़ुबां, करेगी बयान सारे कुलों से ।

title: मेरा बोझ उठाया यीशु ने / Jesus took my burdens

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
I'm so happy here's the reason why
Jesus took my burdens all away
Now I'm singing as the days go by
Jesus took my burdens all away
Once my heart was heavy with the load of sin
Jesus took my burdens gave me peace within
Now I'm singing as the days go by
Jesus took my burdens all away.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
मैं ख़ुश हूँ और ख़ुश हूँ इसलिए, मेरा बोझ उठाया यीशु ने
अब मैं गाता गीत ख़ुशी से, सारा बोझ उठाया यीशु ने ।
एक समय अशान्ति मेरे दिल में थी, यीशु ने हटाकर मुझे शान्ति दी
अब मैं गाता गीत ख़ुशी से, सारा बोझ उठाया यीशु ने ।

title: जब वे कहने लगे आओ यहोवा के घर / I was glad

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
I was glad very glad when they said unto me
Let us go to the house of the Lord today
There is singing there is dancing there is victory
In the house of the Lord today.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
जब वे कहने लगे आओ यहोवा के घर
हम सब मिलकर चले मेरा दिल ख़ुश हुआ
गाएँगे नाचेंगे उछलेंगे नाचेंगे
यहोवा के घर में आज ।

title: हम स्तुति की भेंट लाते हैं / We bring sacrifice of praise

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
We bring sacrifice of praise, into the house of the Lord - 2
And we offer unto you, the sacrifices of thanks giving
And we offer unto you, the sacrifices of joy.

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
हम स्तुति की भेंट लाते हैं, भवन में तेरे हे प्रभु
भवन में हम तेरी स्तुति करते हैं, भवन में आकर तेरे हे प्रभु
हम चढ़ाते हैं तुझको, धन्यवादों की भेंट अपनी
और देते हैं तुझको, सर्वस्व अपना प्रभु ।

title: हे स्वर्गीय पिता, हो धन्यवाद

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
हे स्वर्गीय पिता, हो धन्यवाद
हो तेरी स्तुति, आराधना
करता समर्पण, आत्मा और जीवन
तेरी आराधना, दे तन–मन–धन ।
मेरे मसीहा ............
हे पवित्र आत्मा ............

title: अर्पण मैं करता हूँ तुझको

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
1. अर्पण मैं करता हूँ तुझको, तू ही तो मेरा पिता है
अपनी इच्छा से तू ले चल, ये जीवन मैं सौंपता हूँ ।

कोरस: तेरा प्रेम जो क्रूस पर देखा, चरणों में तेरे जो मुझको लगा
करके तू पाक मेरे दिल को, सामर्थ्य दे दे अब ।

2. तुझ बिन में कुछ भी नहीं हूँ, इस जग में परदेशी ठहरा
मुझको तू ले चल हमेशा, तुझमें सदा मैं रहूँ ।

title: अनुग्रह का तेरे प्रभु

stanzas.label: Hindi
stanzas.text:
1. अनुग्रह का तेरे प्रभु, कैसे मैं वर्णन करूँ
समझ के बाहर तेरा प्रेम, कैसे बखान मैं करूँ ।

कोरस: तेरी दया का जो पहना हूँ ताज, मैं गाऊँ उठा के आवाज़
मैं जो कुछ भी आज हूँ, तेरे अनुग्रह से हूँ ।

2. तेरा फ़ज़ल है ख़ुदा, मरने से मैं जो बचा
सदा की वो मौत हटा, दिया तूने जीवन नया ।

title: Lord, I lift your name on high

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Lord, I lift your name on high
Lord, I love to sing your praises
I'm so glad you're in my life
I'm so glad you came to save me
You came from heaven to earth, to show the way
From the earth to the cross, my debts to pay
From the cross to the grave, from the grave to the sky
Lord, I lift your name on high.

title: Majesty, worship His majesty

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Majesty, worship His majesty
Unto Jesus, be all glory, honour and praise
Majesty, Kingdom authority
Flows from His throne, unto His own, His anthem raise!
So exalt, lift up on high the name of Jesus
Magnify, come glorify, Christ Jesus the King
Majesty, worship His majesty
Jesus, who died, now glorified
King of all kings.

title: We have come into His house

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
We have come into His house
And gathered in His name to worship Him (3)
Worship Him, Jesus Christ the Lord.
Let's forget about ourselves
And concentrate on Him and worship Him (3)
Worship Him, Jesus Christ the Lord.
He is all my righteousness
I stand complete in Him and worship Him (3)
Worship Him, Jesus Christ the Lord.

title: The fulness of the God head bodily

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
The fulness of the God head bodily
Dwelleth in my Lord (3)
And we are complete in Him.
Complete (3) in Him, we are complete in Him.
It's not by works of righteousness
But by His grace alone (3)
And we are complete in Him.
There's nothing more that I can do
For Jesus did it all (3)
And we are complete in Him.

title: Open book

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
1. In the evening when I start to pray, I think about this day
Another page is turned forever, another yesterday
And as the story of my life unfolds, I know you've read it all
Another line to be continued — will I stand or fall?

Open book, to you I am an open book
You know every page by heart
From the ending to the start
Open book, my life is like an open book
As I read between the lines
It's your love that truly binds this open book

2. When the cover of this book is closed
The final chapter read
I hope you'll find it worth the reading
I hope "Well Done" is said!

title: We are here to praise You

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
We are here to praise You, to lift our hearts and sing
We are here to give You, the best that we can bring
And it is our love, rising from our hearts
Everything within us cries, ABBA FATHER!
Help us now to give You, pleasure and delight
Hearts and minds and will that say "I love You Lord!"

title: Give thanks with a grateful heart

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Give thanks with a grateful heart
Give thanks to the Holy One
Give thanks because He's given Jesus Christ, His Son
And now let the weak say I am strong
Let the poor say I am rich
Because of what the Lord has done for us ... Give thanks.

title: Be exalted, the King is exalted on high

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Be exalted, the King is exalted on high
We praise Him
Be exalted, forever exalted His name
He is our Lord, forever His truth shall reign
Heaven and earth, rejoice in His holy name
Be exalted, the King is exalted on high.

title: Father God, I wonder

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Father God, I wonder how I managed to exist
Without the knowledge of Your parenthood
And Your loving care
But now I am your child, I am adopted in your family
And I will never be alone
Cause Father God You're there beside me
I will sing Your praises (3) ..... for evermore.

title: Thy Word is a lamp unto my feet

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Thy Word is a lamp unto my feet
And a light unto my path.

When I feel afraid, think I've lost my way
Still you are there right beside me
And nothing will I fear, as long as you are near
Please be near me to the end.

I will not forget, Your love for me, and yet
My heart forever is wandering
Jesus, be my guide, and hold me to your side
And I will love you to the end.

title: Great is Thy faithfulness

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases
His mercies never come to an end
They are new every morning, new every morning
Great is Thy faithfulness, O Lord
Great is Thy faithfulness.

title: Turn your eyes upon Jesus

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Turn your eyes upon Jesus, look in His wonderful face
And the things of the earth will grow strangely dim
In the light of His Glory and Grace.

title: Open our eyes Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Open our eyes Lord; we want to see Jesus
To reach out and touch Him, and say that we love Him
Open our ears Lord and help us to listen
Open our eyes Lord; we want to see Jesus.

title: You shall go out with joy

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
You shall go out with joy, and be led forth with peace
The mountains and the hills, will break forth before you
There'll be shouts of joy, and all the trees of the fields
Will clap, will clap their hands
And all the trees of the fields will clap their hands ... (3)
While you go out with joy.

title: The glory of the risen Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Who shall declare, the glory of the risen Lord
Incomparable, with the beauty of the Lord?
Forever He will be, the Lamb upon the throne
I gladly bow my knee, and worship Him alone.
For He was slain, to reconcile man to God.
Forever You will be, the Lamb upon the throne
I gladly bow my knee, And worship You alone.

title: It's a great thing to praise the Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
It's a great thing to praise the Lord ......... (3)
Walking in the light of the Lord.
Walk walk walk in the light ......... (3)
Walking in the light of the Lord.
It's a great thing to love the Lord ......... (3)
Walking in the light of the Lord.
It's a great thing to serve the Lord ...... (3)
Walking in the light of the Lord.

title: Come bless the Lord

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
Come bless the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord
Who stand by night, in the house of the Lord
Lift up your hands, in the holy place
And bless the Lord, and bless the Lord.
Oh taste and see that the Lord is good ..... (3)
Blessed is the man, who trusts in Him!

title: यीशु अच्छा है / My Lord is good

stanzas.label: English
stanzas.text:
He lifted me up from the miry clay
And set my feet on the rock to stay
He put a song in my heart today
A song of praise, a song of praise.

My Lord is good (6)
He's so good to me.

stanzas.label: Multilingual
stanzas.text:
यीशु अच्छा है (6) मुझको
यीशु चंगा है (6) मैनु          (पंजाबी)
जीसू उत्तोमो (6) मोचाई         (उड़िया)
जेसू भालो छे (6) आमोके        (बंगाली)
येशु आसरो छे (6) माने          (गुजराती)
एशु चंगला है (6) मला           (मराठी)
औल्ले देवरू (6) ननगे           (कन्नड़)
मंची येसय्या (6) नाकू          (तेलुगू)
येसु नल्लवर (6) एणक            (तमिल)
येशु नल्लवन (6) एनिक           (मलयालम)
येसे राम रोछे (6) मलाई         (नेपाली)
यीशु एपोडू (6) नाला           (तिब्बती)
शूनाशिनन्चु (6) नयगे           (कोरियन)
शुआ शुबरासी (6) शुआ           (जापानी)
होलो रोडेरा (6) नीसि           (अफ्रीकी)
